items.title: Copper Giant Extends Mineralization Below the Conceptual Pit at Mocoa and Confirms a Third Mineralized Corridor
items.summary: Deep infill hole MD-064 returns 1,052 metres of mineralization, including 486 m of 0.57% CuEq* (0.41% Cu and 0.029% Mo), exceeding the 0.51% resource average.

items.title: Copper Giant Expands Mocoa Resource Footprint and Advances Connector Zone Toward The La Estrella With Three Drill Rigs Turning
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. today reports that three drill rigs are operational at Mocoa, focusing on expanding the mineralized footprint and connecting historical zones.

items.title: Copper Giant Begins Planned Comprehensive PEA for the Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum System with Globally Recognized Development Team
items.summary: Copper Giant has launched a planned NI 43-101 Preliminary Economic Assessment for Mocoa, appointing SLR as lead consultant alongside INTERA, Frank Wright Consulting, SGS Canada, and APEX Geoscience.

items.title: Copper Giant, Working with the Colombian Government, Secures Long-Term Development Framework at Mocoa; Third Drill Rig Now Operational
items.summary: A cooperative long-term development framework has been established with local authorities and the Colombian government to support sustainable infrastructure and environmental planning.

items.title: Copper Giant's First Directional Daughter Holes Beat Resource Model at Mocoa, Returning 0.97% CuEq Over 68m
items.summary: First daughter hole returns 0.97% CuEq (0.70% Cu and 0.051% Mo) over 68m within a broader interval of 371m of 0.53% CuEq, beating resource model projections.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Appointment of New Director
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. is pleased to announce the appointment of Mr. Jamie Sokalsky, former CEO of Barrick Gold, as a Director of the Company.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Filing of Preliminary Economic Assessment
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. announces filing of a technical report detailing the Preliminary Economic Assessment for the Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum Project.

items.title: Copper Giant Drills Highest Grade Interval to Date at Mocoa
items.summary: Massive sulphide intercepts found in the Mocoa Deposit's Central Porphyry continue to expand along the recently discovered Connector Zone.

items.title: Copper Giant Files MD&A and Interim Financial Statements
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. has filed its interim management's discussion and analysis for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2025.

items.title: Copper Giant Discovers Major New Target at Mocoa
items.summary: High-grade copper-molybdenum breccia mineralization discovered approximately 1.5 km southeast from the main Mocoa deposit footprint.

items.title: Copper Giant Commences Regional Mapping and Geochemical Program
items.summary: Exploration crews mobilize to conduct district-scale mapping and soil sampling across newly acquired concession areas adjacent to the Mocoa deposit.

items.title: Copper Giant Completes First Tranche of Private Placement
items.summary: Copper Giant closes the initial tranche of its previously announced non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of C$4.5 million.

items.title: Copper Giant Enters Option Agreement to Acquire Mocoa Project
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. enters into a definitive agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum Project in Putumayo, Colombia.
